items.title_en: Musk sought settlement with OpenAI before Oakland trial, filing shows
items.title_zh: 文件显示，马斯克在奥克兰审判前寻求与 OpenAI 达成和解
items.desc_en: Musk is seeking changes to OpenAI's leadership and $150 billion in damages from OpenAI and Microsoft, one of its largest investors.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克正在寻求改变 OpenAI 的领导地位，并向 OpenAI 和其最大投资者之一微软赔偿 1500 亿美元的损失。

items.title_en: Warsh's take on Fed independence is met with confusion and some concern
items.title_zh: 沃什对美联储独立性的看法引起了困惑和一些担忧
items.desc_en: Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh is putting his own spin on the independence of monetary policy. Many former Fed officials aren't sold.
items.desc_zh: 美联储主席提名人凯文·沃什对货币政策的独立性提出了自己的看法。许多前美联储官员并没有被说服。

items.title_en: McDonald's likely to bounce as fast-food chain overhauls menus, marketing, UBS says
items.title_zh: 瑞银表示，随着快餐连锁店彻底改革菜单和营销，麦当劳可能会反弹
items.desc_en: McDonald's shares are down 11% over the past three months, but they should gain ground as the company's moves to increase sales begin to pay off, per UBS.
items.desc_zh: 瑞银表示，麦当劳的股价在过去三个月下跌了 11%，但随着公司增加销售额的举措开始取得成效，股价应该会上涨。

items.title_en: AI chipmaker Cerebras targets $3.5 billion raise in IPO

items.desc_en: The share sale could give the company a valuation of up to $24.5 billion, compared with $23 billion as of February.
items.desc_zh: 此次股票出售可能使该公司估值高达 245 亿美元，而截至 2 月份为 230 亿美元。

items.desc_zh: 萨汉德告诉英国广播公司国际台，他向伊朗发送卫星互联网终端，以帮助展示“真实情况”。

items.title_en: Concern for jailed Iranian Nobel laureate as family say health deteriorating
items.title_zh: 被监禁的伊朗诺贝尔奖获得者家人表示健康状况恶化，令人担忧
items.desc_en: On Friday her family said the 54-year-old had been taken from prison to a local hospital after a sharp deterioration in her health.
items.desc_zh: 周五，她的家人表示，54 岁的她的健康状况急剧恶化，已被从监狱送往当地一家医院。

items.desc_zh: 您的个人人工智能助理，原生于您的桌面

items.title_en: Weight loss and hair loss: The growing hair treatment market from GLP-1s
items.title_zh: 减肥和脱发：GLP-1 不断增长的头发治疗市场
items.desc_en: A common side effect of many GLP-1 drugs is hair loss. It's creating a formerly untapped but growing market for hair treatment products.
items.desc_zh: 许多 GLP-1 药物的一个常见副作用是脱发。它正在为头发护理产品创造一个以前未开发但不断增长的市场。

items.title_en: Manex
items.title_zh: Manex
items.desc_en: Preserve useful answers, corrections, and context as memory
items.desc_zh: 保留有用的答案、更正和上下文作为记忆

items.title_en: Oscars says AI actors, writing cannot win awards
items.title_zh: 奥斯卡称人工智能演员、编剧不能获奖
items.desc_en: The academy that controls the Oscars on Friday issued new award eligibility requirements around the use of artificial intelligence in film.
items.desc_zh: 周五，负责奥斯卡颁奖典礼的学院针对人工智能在电影中的使用发布了新的获奖资格要求。

items.title_en: Bright idea? UK firm pioneers data centres using lampposts
items.title_zh: 好主意？英国公司开创了使用灯柱的数据中心
items.desc_en: The solar-powered iLamps will have a built-in Nvidia chip but there are questions over their security and scalability.
items.desc_zh: 太阳能 iLamps 将内置 Nvidia 芯片，但其安全性和可扩展性存在问题。

items.title_en: Pentagon says US military to be an 'AI-first' fighting force
items.title_zh: 五角大楼表示美军将成为一支“人工智能优先”的战斗部队
items.desc_en: The US military has agreed eight new contracts with big tech firms as it expands its artificial intelligence capabilities.
items.desc_zh: 美国军方在扩大人工智能能力的同时，已与大型科技公司签订了八份新合同。

items.title_en: Elon Musk's latest Tesla pay valued at $158bn - but he can't pocket it
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克（Elon Musk）最新的特斯拉薪酬价值 1580 亿美元 - 但他无法将其装进口袋
items.desc_en: Musk must meet a range of ambitious milestones at Tesla to justify the monster pay packet - so far he has not.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克必须在特斯拉实现一系列雄心勃勃的里程碑，才能证明巨额薪酬的合理性——到目前为止，他还没有做到。

items.title_en: Spotify adds 'Verified' badges to distinguish human artists from AI
items.title_zh: Spotify 添加“已验证”徽章以区分人类艺术家和人工智能
items.desc_en: The music streaming platform will review criteria such as artists' live dates and social media presence.
items.desc_zh: 该音乐流媒体平台将审查艺术家的现场日期和社交媒体存在等标准。

items.title_en: Will AI lead to more accurate opinion polls?
items.title_zh: 人工智能会带来更准确的民意调查吗？
items.desc_en: It's cheaper and faster to collect people's opinions using AI, but will it make polls more accurate?
items.desc_zh: 使用人工智能收集人们的意见更便宜、更快捷，但它会让民意调查更准确吗？

items.title_en: Apple hails 'extraordinary' iPhone demand as boss Tim Cook heads out
items.title_zh: 苹果公司老板蒂姆·库克离职后称赞 iPhone 需求“非凡”
items.desc_en: Cook is preparing to bow out after 15 years at the helm and hand over to John Ternus.
items.desc_zh: 库克准备在执掌公司 15 年后辞职，将权力移交给约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus)。

items.title_zh: OpenAI 告诉 ChatGPT 模型停止谈论妖精
items.desc_en: The AI firm said that unlike previous model bugs, this issue "crept in subtly".
items.desc_zh: 这家人工智能公司表示，与之前的模型错误不同，这个问题“悄然出现”。

items.title_en: Meta in row after workers who say they saw smart glasses users having sex lose jobs
items.title_zh: 那些声称看到智能眼镜用户发生性行为的工人失业后，Meta 连续失业
items.desc_en: Meta and its subcontractor disagree over why over 1000 Kenya-based workers were made redundant.
items.desc_zh: Meta 及其分包商对于为何裁员 1000 多名肯尼亚工人存在分歧。

items.title_en: Musk accuses OpenAI lawyer of trying to 'trick' him in combative testimony
items.title_zh: 马斯克指责 OpenAI 律师试图在好斗的证词中“欺骗”他
items.desc_en: Elon Musk was cross-examined on the third day of the trial over his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI.
items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 在审判的第三天就他对萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 和 OpenAI 的诉讼接受了盘问。

items.title_en: The friendlier the AI chatbot the more inaccurate it is, study suggests
items.title_zh: 研究表明，人工智能聊天机器人越友好，它就越不准确
items.desc_en: Researchers found adjusting AI systems to be more warm and friendly to users would result in an "accuracy trade-off".
items.desc_zh: 研究人员发现，将人工智能系统调整为对用户更加热情和友好会导致“准确性权衡”。

items.title_en: Musk accuses Altman of stealing a charity as courtroom battle begins
items.title_zh: 法庭之战开始时，马斯克指责奥特曼窃取慈善机构
items.desc_en: The case over OpenAI's history and public commitments could have major implications for the future of AI.
items.desc_zh: The case over OpenAI's history and public commitments could have major implications for the future of AI.
